headline: IQVIA.ai Launch With NVIDIA Puts IQVIA’s AI Valuation In Focus
summary: IQVIA Holdings (NYSE:IQV) has launched IQVIA.ai, a proprietary AI platform built in partnership with NVIDIA. The platform is designed to support new applications across life sciences operations, from research to commercial activities. IQVIA, a major player in clinical research and healthcare data services, is moving deeper into AI with IQVIA.ai, aiming to apply advanced computing to the complex demands of life sciences. For readers tracking NYSE:IQV, this development sits at the...
